message:
Add 'in' operator, fix slicing leaks, and complete built-ins

Agent 1: Implement 'in' operator
- Added 'in' and 'not in' support for lists, dicts, strings (operators.zig)
- Fixed memory leaks using labeled blocks with defer for temp PyObjects
- Generated code: blk: { const temp = create(); defer decref(temp); break :blk contains(temp, haystack); }
- Tests: in_operator, in_operator_dict, in_operator_string all pass

Agent 2: Fix slicing memory leaks
- Added needs_decref field to ExprResult (codegen.zig:55)
- Mark slice operations as needing defer (expressions.zig:463)
- Generate defer statements for sliced PyObjects (statements.zig:177,202)
- All slice operations now properly freed

Agent 3: Fix built-in functions
- Fixed allocator warning (changed const to var, added suppression)
- Fixed zip() bug - properly cast PyObject to PyList before accessing items
- Implemented correct Python zip() behavior (stops at shortest list)
- range(), enumerate(), zip() all working correctly

Results:
- Tests: 36/76 passing (47%, up from 39%)
- +6 tests passing
- Memory management significantly improved
- All core built-ins functional
